title: selaginella rasoloheryi
intro: Selaginella rasoloheryi, also known as a type of spore-bearing vascular plant, is a species of resurrection fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Madagascar for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella rasoloheryi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
